ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "game_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "player_score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who made the move */,
  "move" INTEGER /* The move made by the player */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the move was made */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the move was made */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of move (e.g., attack, defend) */,
  "move_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the move (if applicable) */,
  "move_result" TEXT /* Result of the move (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game for which analytics are recorded */,
  "total_moves" INTEGER /* Total number of moves made in the game */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for moves in the game */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were generated */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., single-player, multi-player) */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score of players in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Last login timestamp of the player
Reference to the player who made the move
The move made by the player
Timestamp of when the move was made
Reference to the game in which the move was made
Result of the move (e.g., success, failure)
